entities.grandmother: a grandmother wearing a green apron

scenes.title: The Baking
scenes.background_prompt: A warm cozy kitchen with a wooden table, shelves with jars, a window with afternoon light, tiled floor. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm cozy kitchen. A boy with curly hair and a grandmother in a green apron stand by a wooden table placing fresh cookies in a red box. A small brown dog watches from under the table. Afternoon light through the window. Shelves with jars in the background.

A: dog watches from under the table
